name: web3-data
tagline: On-chain data + crypto social intelligence via Chainbase & Tops
description: A Claude Code skill covering two Chainbase services: (1) Web3 on-chain data — query token holders, token prices, wallet analytics, DeFi portfolios, ENS domains, and custom SQL across Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Avalanche, zkSync, and more; (2) Crypto social intelligence via Tops — discover trending narratives, search topics, retrieve Twitter/X mentions, and monitor KOL signals. Tops requires no API key and is free to use.
